reviews.review_msg: She is kind and approachable, but the midterms were very short and much harder than the lecture and assignment questions. The notes were brief and not very helpful. The final exam was also difficult, class averages were low, and no curve was applied
This class made me lose hope for humanity

Apart from the first midterm, which was a bit too hard and long, her exams were pretty fair, and one midterm mark gets dropped as long as you attend tutorials and do better on the final.  There's a few complaints about her notes being messy, but just attend lectures and write your own and you'll be fine.

The person who said she's bad and shouldn't take physics at all. Take her meat out ya mouth bruh. You the same person who complained about getting an 80%. Be ashamed of yourself. Anyways the prof wasn't the best in all my years at sfu, notes were dysfuncitonal and the exam itself did not correlate to the questions assigned. Midterms are dropped too

Worst professor ever. She actually genuinely made my blood boil. She doesn't give lecture notes beforehand. Her writing is impossible to read. Assignments are fairly doable. No practice exams. Lectures full of iclickers. And she made my stress and anxiety skyrocket. I constantly cried this semester cause of her. TA's didn't do anything

First Midterm was very bad but she atleast listens to students and adjust it. Biggest complaint is that her wording on the questions can get very confusing make sure to read it over and over or ask a TA during test. Allowed to drop lowest MT mark with enough attended tutorials. Tutorials are great should attend but not mandatory. Avg prof

before people starting saying that people are just salty... look at her midterm averages. they are so low comapred to the historical averages, thats on her poor teaching. just because YOU did good doesnt mean the prof is, some students are struggling and a professor can really make or break that, nancy forde will break it

Anyone saying she is a 5 is probably in a gc complaining about an 80%. This class is hard, and no one wants to be in it, We have no choice; this is a prerequisite. Dr Forde is nice, but she is not a good prof; her lectures don't give enough information. Her exams are hard and cover things she skimmed on. Don't listen to the people blaming students.

Anyone who gives her a 5 already has a good concept of physics. Yes, online, written and iClicker is extremely fair. But the test are from the depths of hell. MCQ is fair you could probably figure it out since its from the iclicker / theory and get a decent mark. But the written material is random and only 2 questions thats worth (50%) of the exam.

people saying shes bad really shouldnt take Phys at all, you just need 50% of clicker grades to get the full 100%. She has achieve hw weekly and written hw biweekly, but those are pretty fair for practice, and you just need to go through the hw again to do well on the test. But getting only 1 sided cheatsheet for 36 lectures is crazy fr
A lecture with only iclickers is no lecture at all

One singular practice assignment vs a practice final / questions is laughably different. Dr Forde, does not take students feedback, she believes what she does is fine and will waste lec on lec with random examples. Even her review sessions were not helpful. Sure she's passionate, doesn't mean she should teach.
Her lectures give barely good info, most of them are random yap or unexplained things

PHYS 102 itself is difficult and hard to get through and while there is no explicit practice exams provided Dr. Forde still takes in students feedback and tries her best to fullfil our needs (such as providing practice assignments) and genuinely cares. The lectures are clear with information and she makes the course enjoyable with her passion.
I miss JFC from first year... and that is saying something
Dr Forde should not be a professor, especially for 102. She does not teach well, and the only people doing well are those focused on physics as a major / minor.
she does not provide any review material for the three exams... doesnt teach... avoid her
save yourself, go to surrey if u have to
Take this course with Andrew, trust
the eyes chica... they never lie (hers tell of evil)
Her freaking slides are the most pathetic things I have ever seen.. does not provide lecs before and half of em are filled with junk on random things
bad exams, bad slides, bad prof
avoid her, shes the worst i cannot stand her
she made me listen to baby shark, NOT the 1950s version
avoid avoid avoid avoid LIKE THE PLAGUE SHE SICKENS ME

I am a lifelong Ford owner. Crooked woke "Nancy Forde" made me set my car on fire and buy a Chevrolet. Real SFU patriots should AVOID taking this course like CS students avoid the shower.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
very very bad.

never in my wildest dreams did i think she would be this bad. iclicker is what she relies on to teach or just chicken scratching her notes for us to pretend to follow, and her exams.. so bad and she has the audacity to say "you guys are not where I want u to be" whose fault is that lol
She's awful. Avoid at all cost. Does not care about students if they have medical emergencies
i regret taking this class with her... i am like doing so bad and she could not care less abt her students... she wont scale too
I had to get my exam deferred for a personal reason, and she did not even care to listen, literally no idea what to do now.
She is probably the worst prof at sfu
I had emergency surgery done. Emailed her if I can get  DE so I can recover. She denied me. Fack her
may god save my grade...
Shes nice and all but could not care less about students mental health lol. her exams made me want to quit my undergrad
*sigh* idk man

So, its not great, the exams really are unfair and she doesn't fix anything. She uses iclicker so much but it does not help with anything.
I regret taking it with her
All she did was doing iclicker. she literally did not teach and her exams were so different from her lectures. Good luck on your second attempt!

Dont take it with her. Your grade will suffer; her exams are so long and do not reflect the amount of content she teaches. She will teach A B C and the test will be on D. It's unfair, and she doesn't seem to care. Idk if she will scale too so thats great.

She was an okay prof. Physics is a hard  subject but she did her best. She records her lectures and has a policy if you attend 80% of your tutorials, your lowest midterm will be dropped. I was actually very ill for midterm 2 and I emailed her bc I panicked. but she was very accommodating that she excused me from the midterm. She is very kind

bro wtf was this class LMAO this was basically hell on earth. so much work like FR NO JOKE and the exams were planned to lower the average so please dont take it w nancy unless you want to kill yourself w the workload and material. DEADASS TAKE IT W ANDREW DEBENEDICTIS

this class demanded 9 hours of work a week outside of lecture (said by nancy herself). so exhausting...achieve has pre-lec assignments which is just the lecture taught on achieve and all she does in class is go over questions from pre-lecture. she doesn't teach you the content, you get that from achieve. i hated it so much.

Her recordings were trash. So much work for this class with pre lecture assignments to written homework. The pre lectures on achieve are basically the lecture so she only goes over questions from the pre lecture in class and doesn't teach the material herself. final exam was decent but I would avoid this prof and take Andrew debenedictis instead

Dr. Forde was the best physics prof I have ever had. Her exams are fair. Questions come from lectures and homework, so when I prepared I did well. If you are a non-physics major and need physics classes for your degree, I highly recommend taking them with Nancy.

she records lectures but if you're planning to rely on the recordings... don't. She mutes herself on accident half the time an the other half she won't even be recording the correct screen. Other than that she's okay. She emphasizes some topics but the exam might not even include what she emphasized.
